description:
Operating Area: Bonifacio, Cagliari, Cannes, Costa Smeralda, Destinations, French Riviera / Corsica, Italy, La Maddalena, Mediterranean, Monaco, Nice, Olbia, Porto Cervo, Sardinia, Tuscan Archipelago

Porthos Sans Abri, beautiful Motor Yacht Ferretti 881 Fly built 2012, which underwent various refits in 2017, 2019 and winter 2020, always been kept in excellent condition. With its bright, contemporary and elegant atmosphere, Porthos offers unrivaled style and comfort.

Porthos Sans Abri boasts dimensions and spaces that have nothing to do with ships longer than 30 meters. The large and bright living room with two opposing sofas, the well-separated dining area with large square table, the light furnishings with blue inserts and the light wooden floors make the living area extremely elegant and welcoming. The sofa and external table on the stern complete this area, projecting the warm and pleasant atmosphere of the yacht outside. The original galley looks forward through the large front window and the cockpit is separate and elevated.
Porthos is available for charters in Sardinia and Corsica. She is also available in South of France in May and June for weekly charters only with No Delivery fees

Accommodation: Porthos Sans Abri offers high-class accommodation for up to 10 guests in 4 spacious cabins with exquisitely designed and highly livable furnishings, each equipped with beautiful bathrooms: from the luxurious Owner’s cabin with large windows and a large and original bathroom with tub, to the comfortable VIP cabin also with a large double bed, to the two guest cabins with separate beds which have the possibility of using a third pullman bed. The exteriors are rational and large. In addition to the very spacious fly bridge which boasts a perfect area for relaxation and privacy, of particular importance is the system which, by lowering the large door, allows the stern to be transformed into a large platform extended over the water which allows guests to live in close contact with the sea.

crew.name: Carlo MALGARI
crew.bio:
Born in Sardinia, La Maddalena, 24th February 1974
Spoken Languages: italian (mother tongue), english (fluent).
Education: Diploma from Nautical Institute La Maddalena ; International School Professional training course Titles: Master Mariner – Captain of Pleasure Vessels – Captain on 3000 and above grt ships.
Courses: all those planned and requested by law, lot of additional courses in England and Italy.

Embarks:
1995 MM Service ; 1996-2006 embarked on various merchant ships as cabin boy , sailor, Officer Course , Third Officer ;
2006/2009 Captain of Pleasure vessel 74 Dolphine , Sunseeker Predator 82; since 2010 he has been Captain of many yachts always working for the the same Company, owner of an excellent Sardinian fleet in which he is esteemed and appreciated as a collaborator at the highest levels: from 2010 to 2013 he has been Captain of Cranchi, Atlantique 50'. From 2014 to summer of 2017 Carlo Malgari was Captain on Sunseeker Predator 72', Aspire of London with great satisfaction of the Owner who decided to appoint him, in 2018, Captain of the latest important purchase the Ferretti 881, Porthos Sans Abri. 2025 will be his 15th year on board of yachts of the same Company and the 7th year on board of Porthos Sans Abri. Carlo is a quite, serious , conscientious, hardworking and reliable Captain in all circumstances, featuring a great calm, experience of almost twenty years and a truly superior preparation , an expert sailor and a great expert of Sardinia and Corsica area. He is a kind and helpful professional, naturally elegant in relationships, he knows how to earn the respect and trust of the guests being always able to meet their needs at all times.

crew.name: Camilla FIORI
crew.bio:
Born in Sassari on December 24,1986 and residing in the beautiful port of Alghero,
Education: Camilla graduated from the scientific High School of Sassari in 2007.
Spoken Languages : Italian, english and spanish very well.

From the year of her diploma she has always worked in Italy and abroad in various activities including responsibility, and mainly in catering.
After some experiences on smaller boats, she was Stewardess/Chef on the AB 116 MUSA from 2017 to 2020, where she worked both for private activity and on charter and where she carried out all the activities planned on a demanding and important boat at the highest levels.
In the 2021 season she held the position of Stewardess and Cook on the Sunseeker 81 Lady N. In 2022 Camilla embarked on Porthos Sans Abri with the difficult and demanding task of Stewardess/Chef and she immediately carried out her activity in an excellent way, fully deserving her reconfirmation for the 2023 season. Passionate about cooking in which she tries to reach ever higher goals, a lover of the sea and yachts, with a sunny and cheerful character, active, patient, always present on board, she is very serious and precise in her work. Camilla is particularly suitable to fill the complex role that the yacht's Owner and the Captain are asking her. She is a sure point of reference for guests and a sincere and reliable friend for the crew members

crew.name: Fabio ALFONSO
crew.bio:
Fabio Alfonso was born in La Maddalena, Sardinia in 1977.
Graduated from the Nautical Institute of La Maddalena in 1997, naval engineering branch, expert for marine installations.

From 1998 to present days he has worked alternating in technical assignments both as an electrician and as a mechanic during summer boarding. Initially as a hub and motorist on Passenger Vessels and Trawlers, then as a nautical driver for the La Maddalena Park and since 2008 as a sailor, tender driver and mechanic on a motor yacht of a local luxury Hotel company. From 2022 Fabio is onboard of Porthos Sans Abri with full satisfaction of the Capitain. He is a serious, modest and capable person, an excellent sailor and an expert technician. Considering the many experiences he had in all fields, he is able to perform his task in an excellent way both as regards the activity of sailing in contacts with clients than in the conduct of any craft and in dealing with technical problems of any kind. All this, combined with a good knowledge of english language, makes him an excellent Porthos crew member to be trusted in all circumstances.

crew.name: Jacopo ANDELMI
crew.bio:
Jacopo was born in La Maddalena, Sardinia in 1995 and lives there.
Spoken Languages: italian (mother tongue), english (fluent).

Graduated from the Nautical Institute of La Maddalena in 2014, since the age of 15 he has been involved continuously in boats and the sea, first as a cabin boy and then as an officer cadet on pleasure motor and sailing boats for tourist transport, of La Maddalena .In possession of a license to command pleasure boats, in the winter months he dedicates himself to maintenance and work on boats. Jacopo is a serious and willing young sailor with a consolidated seafaring background, and an in-depth knowledge of the area, able to better manage and assist clients with the yacht's water toys and their needs during the charter. Good looking, serene and cordial, he is attentive and open in his contacts with guests.
